title: Taf Toys Tuli Flower Jitter Soft Toy. Jittering Tulip Flower Sensory Baby Toy. Suitable for Infant Boys & Girls from 0 Months +
features: ADORABLE GIFT – our cute tulip toy from the adorable Urban Garden collection! An adorable gift for your special little one!

TRAVEL TOY - Likely to become your baby’s best friend, Tuli the Tulip is designed especially to take on the go. With the easy attach plastic ring, this fun flower toy can be clipped onto the pram hood or stroller bar to provide little ones with a friendly face to look at whilst out and about while the rattling sound will keep them engaged.
JITTERING MOTIION - This super soft activity toy also features a fun jittering motion which can be started by pulling the boutique style wooden ring down and watching this retract.

SENSORY TOYS - Complete with additional sensory features such as tactile ribbons, this baby safe activity toy is safe for birth and helps encourage cognitive development and provides visual stimulation.
0 MONTHS +. Suitable for baby boys & girls from birth
description: Product Description Taf Toys Tuli Flower Jitter Meet Tuli – our cute tulip toy from the adorable Urban Garden collection! Likely to become your baby’s best friend, Tuli the Tulip is designed especially to take on the go. With the easy attach plastic ring, this fun flower toy can be clipped onto the pram hood or stroller bar to provide little ones with a friendly face to look at whilst out and about while the rattling sound will keep them engaged. This super soft activity toy also features a fun jittering motion which can be started by pulling the boutique style wooden ring down and watching this retract. Complete with additional sensory features such as tactile ribbons, this baby safe activity toy is safe for birth and helps encourage cognitive development and provides visual stimulation. Safety Warning adult supervision recommended
